tier_rationale: Manages a portfolio of 3-8 clients simultaneously. Per-seat economics lock in. High status and high network effect — they bring EPOS into every client.
tagline: A senior operator running 3-8 client engagements who needs leverage to look senior in all of them at once.

demographics.decision_authority: sole over personal stack; influences client stack

psychographics.self_identity: I am the senior brain my clients can't afford full-time.
psychographics.core_belief: Every hour billed must look like 10 hours of value.
psychographics.fear: Being exposed as spread too thin across clients.
psychographics.ambition: Run 8 clients with the polish of an embedded executive.
psychographics.status_anxiety: Looking like a consultant playing executive.

pain_points.pain: Each client expects bespoke artifacts, drowning admin time
Hard to show measurable impact across diverse engagements
Cannot remember the right context for the right client meeting
Pipeline of new fractional clients is unpredictable

desired_outcomes.outcome: Per-client context vault that loads instantly before any meeting
Reusable executive artifacts that personalize automatically
Cross-client metrics dashboard for personal P&L

buying_triggers.trigger: Just dropped a critical detail in a client meeting
Revenue plateaued because cannot take more clients
Network peer announced new fractional gig

objections.objection: Each client is too different for one system
objections.counter_angle: Sovereign per-client vaults; one OS, many tenants.

objections.objection: I don't want client data mingled
objections.counter_angle: Sovereign install on operator's machine; per-client encryption boundaries.

objections.objection: Setup time costs me billable hours
objections.counter_angle: Onboarding new client into EPOS takes 30 min and recovers 5 hours/week.
Operator-private by default; client-facing reports are opt-in artifacts.

communication_preferences.proof_type: Per-client outcome stories + portfolio P&L visibility

conversion_path.awareness: LinkedIn essay on fractional context-switching tax
conversion_path.interest: Free 'Portfolio Diagnostic' showing per-client leverage gaps
conversion_path.consideration: Mirror Report on operator's portfolio + load-balancing recommendations
conversion_path.decision: Sovereign install + 30-day onboarding for first 3 clients
conversion_path.retention: Quarterly portfolio reviews + new client onboarding workflow
